focus_points.label: What the next-level role means to him
focus_points.reason: What he means by “senior scope” and what success looks like in the next-level product leadership role, so the growth plan isn’t just a vague list of good habits.

focus_points.label: Where stakeholder trust feels thin right now
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s seeing gaps in trust, influence, or expectation-setting with key stakeholders, and what specific situations make that show up.

focus_points.label: How much he’s leading vs executing
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s still operating as an individual executor in areas that should be driven through others, and what he would delegate if he had more confidence and visibility.

focus_points.label: Strategic ownership he wants to build next
focus_points.reason: What strategic ownership outcomes he wants to be accountable for in the next cycle, because at Head of Product level growth needs measurable leverage, not just more delivery.

focus_points.label: How he frames decisions for execs
focus_points.reason: How he communicates product tradeoffs and progress so senior stakeholders can trust the direction, since career growth here depends on narrative clarity and decision framing.
